pattern: Scanning digits from the right while remembering the largest digit seen lets a single swap push the biggest later digit into the earliest position where it helps most.
hints: Only one swap is allowed, so you want to move a large digit as far left as possible.
For each position, the useful swap is with the largest digit that appears later than it.
Walk from the rightmost digit tracking the index of the maximum digit so far; remember any position whose digit is smaller than that later maximum, then perform the best such swap once.

edge_inputs.description: swap should target the last big digit on ties
